name: EZ Cash Buy Sell Trade
description_short: EZ Cash Buy Sell Trade is a pawn shop located in Washington, PA offering collateral-based loans and the buying/selling of merchandise.
description_long: EZ Cash Buy Sell Trade operates as a traditional pawn shop in Washington, Pennsylvania, serving the local community with quick access to cash through collateral-based lending. The business is physically located at 1255 W Chestnut St in Washington, PA 15301, and maintains regular business hours throughout the week to accommodate customer needs. Like most pawn operations, the company facilitates transactions where customers can exchange personal items of value for immediate cash, or purchase pre-owned merchandise. The business model centers on the traditional pawn shop approach: customers bring items, receive quick cash valuations, and can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for short-term loans with the option to reclaim merchandise by repaying the loan plus fees. EZ Cash Buy Sell Trade distinguishes itself through its straightforward "Buy Sell Trade" model, suggesting flexibility in how customers can transact—whether selling items permanently, purchasing used goods, or trading merchandise. The company maintains consistent weekday hours (10 AM-5 PM Monday through Friday) and Saturday hours (10 AM-4 PM), indicating reliable accessibility. Without additional details on their website about specific merchandise categories, loan terms, fees, or interest rates, the company appears to operate as a standard neighborhood pawn shop. The primary limitation for consumers is the lack of transparent pricing, fee structures, or terms visible on their web presence, which is common in the pawn industry but makes it difficult to compare offerings before visiting.
pros: Located in Washington, PA with accessible physical storefront at 1255 W Chestnut St
Maintains consistent business hours throughout the week (10 AM-5 PM weekdays, 10 AM-4 PM Saturday)
Offers immediate cash access without credit checks required (typical of pawn model)
Phone contact available at (724) 222-4499 for customer inquiries
Flexible transaction options through buy, sell, and trade model
cons: No pricing, fee structure, or interest rate information available on website
Limited online presence makes it difficult to research specific terms before visiting
No information on merchandise categories accepted or loan-to-value ratios
Pawn loans typically carry high effective interest rates compared to traditional lending
Website contains only Waze directions page with no company-specific details or policies
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who own items of value
People looking to buy used merchandise at discounted prices
Those seeking to trade items without requiring credit approval
diagnosis: EZ Cash Buy Sell Trade is best for individuals who need immediate cash and own items of sufficient value to pledge as collateral, or for bargain hunters seeking used merchandise. The main caveat is the complete lack of transparent information about fees, interest rates, and specific policies on their web presence, requiring customers to visit in person to understand exact terms—a common pawn shop limitation that makes comparison shopping difficult.
services: Item sales (selling personal items for cash)
Gold and jewelry buying (inferred from pawn shop model)
Quick cash access without credit verification
